title: Invariant Enforcement Policy
description: Defines how invariants are enforced, validated, and remediated within the VINTRACK governance runtime. Specifies validation triggers, severity-based response, and auto-remediation boundaries.
purpose: Ensure all registered invariants are actively validated with deterministic outcomes, proper event emission, and appropriate remediation paths.

rules.condition: execution transition to COMPLETE or milestone completion
rules.description: Invariant validation must pass before any execution may complete.

rules.action: block execution completion, emit critical event, require reconciliation
rules.description: Critical invariant failures are blocking. No execution may complete while critical invariants are violated.

rules.action: emit warning event, require remediation before next milestone
rules.description: High invariant failures are non-blocking for single-ticket execution but must be resolved before milestone completion.

rules.condition: invariant marked auto_recoverable and validation_method supports auto-remediation
rules.action: generate remediation recommendation, require explicit approval for destructive actions
rules.description: Auto-remediation may only affect derived state (projections, stale locks). Canonical state requires explicit approval.

rules.action: emit governance event with severity, invariant_id, details, and remediation
rules.description: Every invariant violation must produce an append-only governance event.

rules.action: engine must not mutate any runtime state during validation
rules.description: The invariant validation engine is strictly read-only. State mutation is forbidden.

invariants.expression: ∀invariant ∈ invariants.json: invariant has id, category, severity, validation_method, remediation
invariants.description: All invariants in the registry must have complete metadata.
Every invariant must have a registered validator implementation.

triggers.description: Run invariant validation before marking execution complete.
Run invariant validation after recovery completes.
